evaluation.criteria: Score 10: Perfect alignment with the James Harden ground truth--lists 2017-18 MVP, three scoring titles (2018-2020), 2016-17 assist title, and the 2022 trade to the 76ers involving Ben Simmons (who won ROY with the 76ers). Score 8: Covers Harden with most milestones yet lacks specific citation for the assist title or the trade details. Score 5: Mentions Harden but leaves the timeline vague or excludes the specific trade component involving the former Rookie of the Year. Score 0: Any answer other than James Harden, or fails to validate the MVP/Scoring/Assist combination.
evaluation.details: Found expected answer "James Harden" in output
